worldRequirement: At least one selected application must change the future meaning or affordance of an earlier place, object, fact, or relationship.
finaleRequirement: The final use recombines rules that the player has actually operated before; it may not introduce an untelegraphed mandatory rule.
conflictPolicy: A declared conflict, canon veto, runtime gap, clone risk, or unrecoverable route risk removes the candidate regardless of weighted score.
overloadRecovery: Remove the lowest-value support pattern before reducing the teaching or consequence depth of the core pattern.
